summary: Derek Owens from a wealth management firm contacted Aegis Cloud Security support regarding persistent policy sync delays and provisioning issues in Aegis Identity, some taking 4-5 hours to propagate. Support engineer Sarah Chen investigated the tenant logs and identified a sync worker queue backup issue on a shared cluster tier, potentially related to remediation work done after a mid-March Detect incident. Sarah offered two immediate actions: escalating the case to P1 for engineering review and migrating Derek's tenant to a dedicated sync worker to alleviate the delays. Derek expressed frustration over the 5-day response gap and raised concerns about renewal given the support experience.
actionItems: Sarah Chen: Submit provisioning request to move CWG-04471 from shared to dedicated sync worker tier and send email confirmation within the hour
Sarah Chen: Escalate case to P1 and engage backend engineering team for root cause investigation with 48-hour SLA
Sarah Chen: Follow up personally with Derek on Wednesday with engineering root cause determination and remediation plan
Sarah Chen: Flag Derek's negative support experience to his account team ahead of renewal conversations

keyMoments.text: Derek describes a provisioning failure that left a new analyst without core system access until the next morning, emphasizing the compliance risk in a financial services environment.
keyMoments.speaker: Derek Owens

keyMoments.text: Derek warns that delayed access could result in audit findings, stressing zero-tolerance compliance obligations as a wealth management firm.
keyMoments.speaker: Derek Owens

keyMoments.text: Derek expresses frustration over a five-day gap with no human response on a Priority 2 case, describing it as going into a black hole.
keyMoments.speaker: Derek Owens

keyMoments.text: Sarah offers to escalate to P1 immediately and migrate the tenant to a dedicated sync worker to restore normal sync times as a short-term fix.
keyMoments.speaker: Sarah Chen

keyMoments.text: Derek states he likes the platform overall but that slow support response makes him nervous about upcoming renewal conversations.
keyMoments.speaker: Derek Owens
